_comment: Claude Code hooks template — copy to ~/.claude/hooks.json or .claude/settings.json

hooks.command: echo '[HOOK] 1. Python 命令前 source .venv/bin/activate 2. 调用 Codex 必须通过 scripts/codex-pair.sh send'

PreToolUse._comment: Block direct tmux commands — force use of codex-pair.sh wrapper

hooks.command: echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"[BLOCKED] Use scripts/codex-pair.sh send instead of direct tmux commands."}'
echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"[BLOCKED] Use scripts/codex-pair.sh send instead of direct tmux commands."}'
echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"[BLOCKED] Use scripts/codex-pair.sh send instead of direct tmux commands."}'

python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[SESSION-END] Before committing: 1) Update pitfalls.md if you hit bugs/reversals 2) Create/update skill if you found reusable methods 3) Write memory if you learned new constraints. If none apply, note: Session-end review: nothing to persist"}}))'

PostToolUse._comment: Remind to search pitfalls after editing source code

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */src/*|*/lib/*|*/scripts/*) python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[PITFALL CHECK] You just modified source code. Search for related pitfalls: python3 -m scripts.qa.search <keywords> --scope pitfalls"}}))' ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac; }
